enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from his mom's house in Boulder on December 18-19, 2016, describing a late night working on a 3D modeling/tracing project (using Google Earth and Wikipedia images), taking his mom to cataract surgery, grabbing food, and struggling with sleep deprivation. He ends with a brief rant about TV drug commercials.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Drives him crazy; finds them absurd and worth satirizing
Tedious but wants to power through before losing momentum

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday, he worked on tracing buildings on Google Earth.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He superimposed a picture from Wikipedia onto Google Earth and traced it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to finish tracing the Forum of Titus next.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He organized files but is unsure how to proceed with them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He worked until six o'clock in the morning and slept for only three hours.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He took his mom to her cataract surgery at 9:30 AM.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He spent an hour at the hospital with his mom.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: After picking his mom up, they went to eat at Mass Burger.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He worked for an hour at home before passing out from exhaustion.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He woke up and has been working for the last couple of hours.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He started watching 'Mary Queen of Scots' last night and wants to finish it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There is no Netflix signal at his mom's house right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He has a fire going and is trying to finish up his work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He hopes to finish tracing the Forum of Titus today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He finds tracing tedious but wants to power through it this time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Watching TV news with his mom drives him crazy due to all the drug commercials.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to bring a list of 20 drugs to his next doctor's appointment as a joke.

transcript.text: Hey, how's it going, living in Boulder, V-Log, for Sunday, December 18th, even though it
Is December 19th, I guess that's how it works.
So yesterday, I went to my mom's house now, yesterday I worked, until 6, just on stuff,
Just random buildings, I started going on the baths of Diocletian, I had to take the
Picture, lift the picture off from the Wikipedia site, I hope it was the biggest one that I
Could find, because I didn't think about just Google Earth-ing it, but yeah, and then I
Superimposed it on top of the Google Earth, and so I'm tracing that, I'm not done though,
And then I'm doing the baths of Titus, and then finish the forum, not much, so I'm almost
Done tracing.
After that, I organize the files, which I don't know how long it'll take, and then I make the
Buildings through these, so that's going to be super exciting, oh my god.
So, so yeah, so today I was working until 6 o'clock in the morning, and got to sleep
While, like, before it got light, so I could feel like I'm getting to sleep at night, and
Then I slept until 9, so I only got three hours of sleep, because I had, my mom picked,
No, no, three and a half hours, just going, because my mom picked me up at 9.30 to take her
To her other cataract surgery, and I was hanging out there in the hospital like an hour, didn't
Take that long, working on my site, and then picked her up, and she took me to eat at Smash
Burger, every once in a while I'll eat meat, and then I, and then I came home, and I worked
For a little bit, like an hour or so, and then I passed out, couldn't keep my eyes open,
So I went to the, like, well, ooh, grocery, and I slept, I don't know, and then I just got
Up, and I watched, it was at 6.41 now, so, I've been working the last couple hours or whatever,
So my mom just went upstairs to her room, and so now, I'm down here, I wanted to watch
Netflix, watch that movie, or that, I started last night, I started watching the Mary Queen
Of Scots show, and I want to watch that whole thing, I was listening to more about Mary Queen
Of Scots, this documentary about castles, so, but there's no signal for Netflix at my mom's
House right now, so, got a fire going right now, so I'm just gonna try to finish up, yeah,
Maybe today, I could finish, finish the tracing of Rome, that would be really exciting, it
Still feels fresh in my mind, so if I can get to the next, the next tour, before I feel
Like it's a new project, then, wow, that's awesome, that'd be really cool, I hate it when
It gets tedious, that's what I always switch, I think I'll be able to power through it this
Time, I was just watching TV with my mom, the news drives me crazy, I can't stand the TV,
All of them, all the drug commercials, next time I go to my doctor, I should bring, like,
A list of 20 drugs, and I should be like, hey, let me ask you about these drugs, because the TV
Said to ask you about it, so should I, that'd be funny, alright, anyway, so that's enough, peace out.
